title: Ayushman Bharat Yojana
description: Providing health cover of ₹5 lakhs per family per year for secondary and tertiary care hospitalization across public and empaneled private hospitals in India.
eligibility: BPL families, low-income groups as per SECC database
benefits: ₹5 lakh health coverage per family per year
No restriction on family size, age or gender
Cashless and paperless access at empaneled hospitals
ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare

title: PM Kisan Samman Nidhi
description: Income support of ₹6,000 per year in three equal installments to all land holding farmer families to supplement their financial needs for procuring various inputs.
eligibility: Small and marginal farmers with cultivable land holding
benefits: Applicable to all farmer families across India

title: National Scholarship Portal
description: Various scholarships for students from class 1 to PhD level to ensure inclusive and equitable quality education for all deserving students.
eligibility: Students based on merit and family income criteria

title: Stand Up India Scheme
description: Bank loans between ₹10 lakh and ₹1 crore to at least one SC/ST borrower and one woman borrower per bank branch for setting up greenfield enterprises.
eligibility: SC/ST and/or women entrepreneurs above 18 years of age
benefits: Composite loan for manufacturing and services
Margin money of 25% (can include convergence support)

title: PM Awas Yojana (Urban)
description: Affordable housing for urban poor with a target of building 2 crore houses. The scheme provides central assistance to implementing agencies through States/UTs.
eligibility: EWS/LIG/MIG categories without a pucca house in any part of India
benefits: Preference to differently-abled and senior citizens
documents: Proof that beneficiary does not own a pucca house
ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs

title: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
description: A small savings scheme for the girl child under 'Beti Bachao Beti Padhao' campaign offering attractive interest rates and tax benefits.
eligibility: Parents/guardians of girl child below 10 years of age
benefits: Maturity period of 21 years from date of opening
Partial withdrawal allowed for higher education after 18 years
documents: Birth Certificate of the girl child

title: MGNREGA
description: Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act guarantees 100 days of wage employment in a financial year to every rural household.
eligibility: Any adult member of a rural household willing to do unskilled manual work
benefits: 100 days of guaranteed wage employment per year
Minimum wages as per state notification
Unemployment allowance if work not provided within 15 days
Work within 5 km of applicant's residence
Equal wages for men and women

title: Digital India Programme
description: A flagship programme to transform India into a digitally empowered society and knowledge economy with focus on digital infrastructure, governance and services.
benefits: High-speed internet across all gram panchayats
Common Service Centres for rural citizens
